text.title: Backlog Grooming and Roadmapping Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying Backlog Grooming and Roadmapping. Each step lists input, action, and output. Pause and surface the artefact when output is produced.

step.name: weekly-grooming-pass
step.action: Score each new/dirty item with RICE or MoSCoW + rationale.

step.name: partition-now-next-later
step.action: Distribute scored items to Now/Next/Later horizons.

decision-gate.p: After the final step, the artefact MUST satisfy the output contract in content/02-output-contract.xml before downstream consumers read it.
